summary: Completed testing of drag-and-drop task reordering functionality. Backend API works correctly, but frontend @dnd-kit implementation has compatibility issues with React 19.

critical_bugs.issue: @dnd-kit library not properly initialized - DndContext not rendering
critical_bugs.details: DndContext elements: 0, Sortable elements: 0. Library appears incompatible with React 19.

integration_issues.issue: No API calls made when dragging tasks - handleDragEnd not triggered

passed_tests: All weeks are expanded by default on page load (found 3+ weeks expanded)
Drag handles (GripVertical icons) are visible on all tasks (37 handles found)
Manual week collapse/expand functionality works correctly
Backend task reordering API endpoint (PUT /api/weeks/{week_id}/tasks/reorder) works correctly
Authentication and session management working properly
UI styling and Airtel branding consistent throughout
Basic pointer events (pointerdown, pointermove) are captured on drag handles
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix @dnd-kit compatibility with React 19. The DndContext is not rendering properly, causing drag-and-drop to be completely non-functional. Consider downgrading React to 18.x or finding React 19 compatible drag-and-drop library. Backend API is working correctly.
